response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming for UNIX embedded systems, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking or LAN-switch security technologies (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X), and no Japanese language proficiency — all mandatory for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems including embedded-like infrastructure
Active contributor to open-source tools and technical education initiatives
concerns: No C programming experience in embedded or UNIX environments as required
No evidence of networking security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.) or switch firmware development
Japanese language proficiency is absent — a hard requirement for the role

key_factors.factor: No Linux kernel or switch security domain experience
